welcome.title: Welcome back.
welcome.subtitle: Take a deep breath. You are in a safe, quiet space.
welcome.checkIn: Let's check in with yourself today.
welcome.selectLanguageSubtitle: Select the language that feels most comfortable and like home to you.
welcome.dailyAffirmation: You are doing your best, and right now, that is more than enough.

chat.placeholder: Gently share what's on your mind today...
chat.crisisAlert: We care deeply about your safety. If you are feeling overwhelmed or in crisis, please connect with immediate support:
chat.quickActionsTitle: Gently explore what you might need right now:

quickActions.vent: I just want a safe space to vent
quickActions.win: Celebrate a tiny win with me

chat.errorReply: I'm right here with you. Let's take a slow, gentle breath together.

breathing.title: Breathing Sanctuary
breathing.subtitle: Follow the gentle circle. Let every exhale release a little tension.
breathing.vibrationCue: Vibration guidance active on supported devices

ambience.title: Nature Soundscapes
ambience.subtitle: Surround yourself with soothing sounds of nature.

dashboard.title: Emotional Check-in
dashboard.subtitle: How are you feeling in this moment? There are no wrong answers here.
dashboard.gratitudePrompt: What is one small, warm thing you feel grateful for today?
dashboard.plantGrowth: Growing gently with every act of self-care you take.

emptyStates.journal: Your story begins here. This safe space is waiting for whatever thoughts you wish to release.
emptyStates.moods: Every journey starts with a single step. Log how you feel today whenever you are ready.
emptyStates.habits: Habits grow like seedlings—slowly and with kindness. Add a gentle habit when you feel ready.
